Class EmailMessage

java.lang.Object
com.daraxtlar.quantummail.model.EmailMessage
public class EmailMessage extends Object
Represents a complete email message returned by the application.

Contains message metadata, content and optional attachment information.

  • Field Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private List<Attachment>
    attachments
    Collection of email attachments.

    private boolean
